element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Used to temporarily tie up opponents and swing on hooks throughout game
Whip-based avoidance required; enemies cannot be killed permanently
Navigating perilous terrain by latching whip to hooks
Battery management, acceleration, braking, steering to avoid depletion
Time-limited search for squeaky toys; spatial navigation shift from platforming
Only permanently defeatable enemy via whip; climactic challenge

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully tying up enemy with whip
typical_tension_triggers: Swinging on hooks over perilous terrain
Battery depletion mechanics in R.C. stages
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Genre-shifting design creates alternating tension cycles—platforming/combat segments interrupted by overhead racing and first-person puzzle stages; genre variety prevents rhythm monotony

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to whip mechanic and basic platforming obstacles; low combat pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Genre shifts introduce R.C. racing with battery management; first-person maze requires spatial reorientation; moderate complexity increase
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounter (Nightmare Buzz) as permanent defeat challenge; convergence of all learned mechanics
notable_spikes: Transition to R.C. overhead perspective (genre shift friction)
First-person claw machine maze (spatial disorientation and time pressure)
Nightmare Buzz boss fight (only permanently defeatable enemy)

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal progression through environments with enemy obstacles that require whip-tying to bypass; hook-swinging over hazardous terrain
Overhead-view stage where player controls R.C. with acceleration/braking/steering; battery resource management determines success
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Buzz knocked out window stage; return-to-moving-truck stage

notable_level_patterns.description: Dramatic perspective shift to first-person navigation; time-limited collection of squeaky toys inside claw machine; spatial puzzle rather than combat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Really Inside the Claw Machine (absent from Windows version)

notable_level_patterns.description: Optional/extended racing variant connecting narrative segments
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Day-toy-na (Genesis/Windows only; moving van to Buzz chase)
